name: Infore Environment Technology Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Infore Environment Technology Group Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells sanitation machines and environmental protection equipment in the People's Republic of China and internationally. The company provides various sanitation equipment, such as sweeping vehicles, cleaning vehicles, garbage trucks, municipal vehicles, snow removal vehicles, intelligent equipment, refuse transfer stations, and new energy equipment; and environmental fans, including nuclear power fans, industrial environmental fans, civil engineering fans, and subway fans. It also offers environmental monitoring products comprising water quality, atmospheric, and hydrological monitoring products. In addition, the company provides environmental services, including sanitation integration services, such as township road sweeping, waste collection and transportation, and sanitation information management services; solid waste management; smart environmental management; atmospheric governance; soil remediation; and water environment treatment services. Further, it designs and develops smart environmental protection systems. The company was formerly known as Zhejiang Shangfeng Industrial Holdings Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Infore Environment Technology Group Co., Ltd. in January 2016. Infore Environment Technology Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1974 and is headquartered in Beijiao, the People's Republic of China.
